seoTitle: Camden vs Camden Head — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Camden and Camden Head. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Camden vs Camden Head: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Camden and Camden Head.
heading: Camden vs Camden Head — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Camden, New South Wales and Camden Head, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Camden Head has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Camden (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Camden or Camden Head safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Camden has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Camden Head scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Camden scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Camden Head scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Camden or Camden Head?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Camden Head has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
